# Code of Conduct

## Our standard

Please keep all interaction in this repository respectful, constructive, and focused on technical collaboration.

Examples of expected behavior:

- be respectful and professional
- discuss technical issues in good faith
- keep criticism specific and constructive
- avoid hostile, insulting, or dismissive behavior
- respect repository scope and contribution boundaries

## Unacceptable behavior

Examples of unacceptable behavior include:

- harassment or personal attacks
- insulting or demeaning language
- bad-faith disruption of technical discussion
- intentionally inflammatory or abusive behavior
- publishing sensitive security details irresponsibly

## Scope

This Code of Conduct applies to repository discussions, issues, pull requests, and related public interactions around this project.

## Security-sensitive topics

For sensitive security issues, please follow the guidance in `.github/SECURITY.md` and prefer private reporting before public disclosure.

## Enforcement

Project maintainers may moderate, edit, hide, lock, or remove content that violates these expectations.
